rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no "fixed" retrospectives, no session biography.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No named techniques or practitioners paraphrased in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 104: **Prompt** *(Cowork, organisers only)* has no action lead-in above it. Same violation at line 144: **Prompt** *(Cowork, organisers only)* lacks lead-in.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add one-sentence lead-in before each `**Prompt**` label describing what Claude does. E.g., 'Ask Claude to use the rehearsal `rollout-notes.md` as a pattern and create three additional fake files.' Keep under 20 words.
File audience is organisers (operational, not business-audience framing); rule does not apply.
